name: Garrote Bolt
description:
Activate 1 Interact

The shaft of this silver bolt is engraved with wiry designs.

When a garrote bolt hits a target, it transforms into a silver garrote and wraps around one of the target's appendages, dealing an additional ] damage. On a critical hit, it wraps around the target's throat, and the target can't breathe until the persistent damage ends.
